intro: This glossary establishes the controlled vocabulary behind AccountCcy.com. Terms here name institutional realities inside enterprise finance — not interchangeable currency codes, but currency states, custody positions, and consequences across the chain from quotation to audit-defensible truth.
doctrine_statement:
Precision of language is precision of control.
When finance teams share vocabulary across treasury, accounting, systems, and audit, fragmentation becomes visible before it becomes distortion.
primary_section_title: Enterprise finance collapses different meanings into the same ISO symbol unless states are named.
primary_section_body: Two postings may both display USD while representing quoted exposure, transaction denomination, settlement cash movement, account custody, ledger maintenance, reporting presentation, group consolidation, or terminal audit defensibility. The code repeats; the institutional meaning does not.

AccountCcy.com maps those meanings through the Currency State Control Framework and the CCY State Chain. This hub defines the anchor terms so navigation, risk discussion, and CFO governance share one disciplined reference layer.
Individual deep-dive term pages will follow as the corpus expands. This page is the authoritative orientation surface — not a flat dictionary, but the terminology constitution for the asset.
graph_title: The vocabulary that binds doctrine, chain, and definition.
graph_intro: Use these definitions when aligning controllers, ERP architects, treasury, consolidation teams, and auditors on where monetary truth changes state — and who owns each boundary.
grid_title: The vocabulary that binds doctrine, chain, and definition.
grid_intro: Use these definitions when aligning controllers, ERP architects, treasury, consolidation teams, and auditors on where monetary truth changes state — and who owns each boundary.

cards.label: Supreme Thesis
cards.title: Monetary Truth
cards.body: The reconciled, supportable, reviewable condition in which balances and flows can be defended under scrutiny — not optimism about rates, but custody discipline across systems and close cycles.

cards.label: Doctrine Motion
cards.title: Chain of Custody
cards.body: The governed sequence through which monetary movement becomes accounting record, ledger reality, reporting visibility, consolidation unity, and audit-defensible proof — the spine of AccountCcy.com.

cards.label: Architecture
cards.title: CCY State Chain
cards.body: Eight ordered institutional states from quoted market signal through audit reality; each state asks a different custody question and admits different failure modes if blurred with its neighbors.

cards.label: Methodology
cards.title: Currency State Control Framework
cards.body: The original AccountCcy structure for naming currency states, transitions, and control obligations — treating account currency as a discipline, not a passive configuration field.

cards.label: Lens
cards.title: Currency State
cards.body: The institutional role currency occupies at a point in the finance chain (quotation, obligation, settlement, account, ledger, reporting, consolidation, audit) — distinct from the mere ISO code printed beside an amount.

cards.label: State 01
cards.title: Quoted Currency
cards.body: The currency in which a price or rate is expressed before a transaction creates obligation — market signal prior to accounting custody.

cards.label: State 02
cards.title: Transaction Currency
cards.body: The currency that denominates the financial event — where obligation takes formal identity inside commerce or operations before full ledger settlement narratives conclude.

cards.label: State 03
cards.title: Settlement Currency
cards.body: The currency of actual cash or settlement rail movement — divergence from transaction currency seeds FX consequences that propagate into postings.

cards.label: State 04 · Control
cards.title: Account Currency
cards.body: The currency assigned to an account for recording, reconciling, and controlling balances — the custody gate where external movement enters internal accounting discipline.

cards.label: State 05
cards.title: Ledger Currency
cards.body: The currency in which books and balances are maintained at entity level — frequently aligned with functional currency policy but not interchangeable with account or reporting layers.

cards.label: Standards Context
cards.title: Functional Currency
cards.body: The currency of the primary economic environment in which an entity operates — an accounting determination that interacts with ledger policy yet remains analytically distinct from every account-level assignment.

cards.label: State 06
cards.title: Reporting Currency
cards.body: The currency of financial presentation for management, regulatory, investor, or internal reporting — translation and policy choices surface here.

cards.label: State 07
cards.title: Consolidation Currency
cards.body: The group currency into which entity reporting layers unify — maximum translation complexity and elimination logic converge at this altitude.

cards.label: State 08
cards.title: Audit Reality
cards.body: Terminal custody state: figures trace to evidence, reconciliations close defensibly, documentation survives independent challenge — the outcome weak state discipline silently forfeits.

control_title: Shared definitions collapse debate cycles into governance cycles.
control_body: When treasury speaks quotation risk while accounting hears ledger truth without naming states, organizations rehearse the same FX drama quarterly. Anchoring vocabulary converts recurring confusion into tractable control maps.
risk_body: Calling every balance "the FX position" or treating reporting currency as interchangeable with account currency erases visibility until close breaks or auditors ask uncomfortable traceability questions.

schema_notes.framework_status: Orientation glossary hub — term-level URLs staged for future publication.
